privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task that tests Eclipse IDE capabilities for fixing file encoding and line ending issues. The task creates a Java project (InternationalApp) with two problems: (1) WindowsService.java file has CRLF (Windows) line endings that must be converted to LF (Unix) using Eclipse's 'File > Convert Line Delimiters To > Unix' feature, and (2) messages_jp.properties file contains UTF-8 encoded Japanese text but the project is configured with ISO-8859-1 encoding, causing mojibake (garbled text). The agent must change the project encoding to UTF-8 via Project Properties. Success requires both fixes: line endings converted to LF and project encoding set to UTF-8. All data is generated synthetically by the setup script, not from external sources.
